_about: Labeled evaluation set. 'answerable' questions have a gold institution+metric resolved directly from the warehouse; 'unanswerable' questions must abstain/clarify. Institution phrasings are chosen to resolve via the strict resolver (alias/abbreviation resolution is documented future work).

answerable.question: What was the admit rate at the University of California-Los Angeles in 2020?

What was the retention rate at the University of Florida?
What was the admit rate at the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill?
answerable.institution: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
